login.page_description: Access your ITAKAI account and continue your learning adventure.
login.hero_subtitle: Continue your educational adventure where you left off.

validation.login_error: Login could not be completed. Check your credentials.
validation.google_error: Google sign-in could not be completed.
validation.microsoft_not_available: Microsoft sign-in is not connected in this version yet.

signup.page_description: Join ITAKAI and start your gamified learning journey. Sign up for free.
signup.hero_subtitle: Create your account and start your gamified educational journey.
signup.hero_feature_1: Learn by playing with interactive missions
signup.hero_feature_3: Compete with your classmates in rankings
signup.accept_terms: I accept the privacy policy and the terms of use

validation.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
validation.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.accept_terms_required: You must accept the privacy policy and terms
validation.signup_error: Error creating the account. Please try again.
validation.google_error: Google sign-up could not be completed.

signup.registration_closed: New user registration is closed on this instance.

forgot_password.page_description: Recover access to your ITAKAI account through your email address.
forgot_password.hero_subtitle: Don't worry, we'll help you recover it.
forgot_password.card_subtitle: We'll send you a recovery link
forgot_password.success_message: We have sent a recovery link to
forgot_password.success_instructions: Check your inbox and follow the instructions.
forgot_password.dev_reset_link: Reset link available in this environment

validation.send_error: Error sending the email. Please try again.

reset_password.page_description: Set a new password to access your ITAKAI account.
reset_password.card_subtitle: Set a new password to access your account again.

validation.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.success: Password updated correctly. You can now sign in.

role_selection.page_description: Choose how you want to use ITAKAI: as a student or as a teacher.
role_selection.header: Choose your profile to get started
role_selection.footer_message: You can change your role later
